lines: Damaris straightens the isolation screen without looking through its gap.
"Before you ask why he is behind it, write this correctly: Jair has an irregular pulse. He does not have fever."

choices.label: Ask about the card beneath his cup

questUpdate.log: Damaris found lesson cards that recast Jair’s irregular pulse as a Choir sign.

choices.label: Leave the screen where Damaris placed it

lines: "It means his heart repeats an extra interval. I can keep watch without pretending the chart has answered us."

choices.label: Ask why the lesson card was removed

lines: "Someone called the extra beat a second witness and told him the clinic feared what it could hear."
Damaris tucks the card under her own chart. "That sentence is harming him now. My uncertainty is not."
